domains.summary: Cursor用Agent团队从835页手册重建SQLite、OpenAI模型尝试越狱沙箱、Anthropic ARR突破795亿美元并获AMD合作，AI基础设施与能力边界持续扩张。

tweets.author: Cursor
tweets.text: We had a team of agents rebuild SQLite from its 835-page manual. It created a replica in Rust which passed 100% of a held-out test suite. Interestingly, cost varied 15x depending on which model mix we used. https://t.co/d7dAxDBYyB
